hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(1 if f.endswith('.env') else 0)"

python3 -c "import sys, json, subprocess, os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); ruff=os.path.join(os.getcwd(),'venv','bin','ruff'); subprocess.run([ruff,'check','--fix',f]) if f.endswith('.py') and os.path.exists(ruff) else None"
